title: crocanthemum scoparium var. vulgare
intro: Crocanthemum scoparium var. vulgare, also known as Rocky Mountain tea or prairie tea, is a perennial herb native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, making it a valuable treatment for various health issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and protecting against oxidative stress. Rocky Mountain tea can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the dried leaves in hot water, or it can be used in tinctures, salves, and other herbal preparations.
